posts.author: jgrant (James Grant)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently there are limited filter options for notifications. I use the filter where I was mentioned pretty much 100% of the time, quite simply as I get way too many notifications.

However, when I use this I do not see AUTOMATION notifications. Could we have a filter for automation notifications added please?

Other functions to improve the volume and filtering of notifications I am also voting for! A big area of improvement for my team and I.

Thanks in advance, James
